features.featureTitle: Revamp the entire frontend visual aesthetic to feel refined, stylish, and aesthetic while retaining the energetic deal-hunting vibe. Replace the current bold/loud color palette with a more curated, premium look — consider deep jewel tones, soft gradients, elegant typography, refined card layouts with subtle shadows and borders, and polished micro-interactions. Update CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and Tailwind tokens in frontend/tailwind.config.js accordingly. Apply changes consistently across all pages and components: HomePage, ListingDetailPage, ProductCard, CategoryFilter, Layout, OrderForm, AdminLoginPage, AdminDashboardPage, ListingsManagementPage, OrdersDashboardPage, AddListingForm, EditListingForm, and CountdownTimer.
